item.title: Checking Python files with Vim
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
Vim is an exôÙceôÙllent ediôÙtoôÙr, and masôÙteôÙring it leaôÙds to moôÙre proôÙducôÙtiôÙviôÙty. Even thouôÙgh is veôÙrôÙy exôÙtenôÙsiôÙble and alloôÙws to be conôÙfiôÙguôÙred by many pluôÙg-ins I raôÙther keep it as simôÙple as poôÙsôÙsiôÙble, ôÙtrôÙying not to use many pluôÙg-ins (neiôÙther paôÙckaôÙgers like VundôÙle, etc.).

HoôÙweôÙveôÙr, I do make use of an exôÙtenôÙsion that cheôÙcks PyôÙthon fiôÙles for errorôÙs, PEôÙP8, aôÙmong other things: flake8. BeôÙcauôÙse I do not use pluôÙg-in plaôÙtforôÙms for ViôÙm, I insôÙtaôÙll just this one maôÙnuaôÙllôÙy, by making the coôÙmôÙmand flake8 avaiôÙlaôÙble sysôÙteôÙm-wiôÙde [1].

Then the insôÙtaôÙllaôÙtion is as simôÙple as doôÙwnôÙloading the proôÙject and coôÙying the fiôÙles inôÙto the ~/.ôÙôÙviôÙôÙm/ôÙôÙftpluôÙôÙgiôÙn/ôÙôÙpôÙôÙyôÙôÙthon diôÙrecôÙtoôÙrôÙy. Make suôÙre you haôÙve the foôÙlloôÙwing liôÙne added on your ~/.ôÙôÙviôÙôÙmrc:

filetype plugin indent on

The feaôÙtuôÙres I use are mainôÙly the synôÙtax and PEôÙôÙP-8 comôÙplianôÙce cheôÙckerôÙs. It can alôÙso warn you about unuôÙsôÙed imôÙporôÙts, and cyôÙcloôÙmaôÙtic comôÙpleôÙxiôÙty.

It is useôÙful beôÙcauôÙse things like PEôÙôÙP-8 comôÙplianôÙce help to haôÙve a good coôÙde quaôÙliôÙty, and theôÙreôÙfoôÙre a moôÙre reaôÙdaôÙble and mainôÙtaiôÙnaôÙble coôÙde baôÙse, speôÙciaôÙlly on larôÙge proôÙjecôÙts wiôÙth loôÙts of fiôÙles and moôÙduôÙleôÙs.

ThaôÙt's all. For moôÙre deôÙtails and other conôÙfiôÙguôÙraôÙtion tips cheôÙckout my Vim seôÙtup.

[1]Another option would be to install it on your virtual environment, but then you have to make sure to install it once per project. It is actually better, because you are not using the global system environment, but for packages like this, it should not be an issue, it's your choice.

item.title: Alpine email client
item.dc:creator: Mariano Anaya
item.description:
AlôÙpiôÙne is a soôÙftwaôÙre I deôÙfiôÙniôÙteôÙly reôÙcoôÙmôÙmend for thoôÙse who like miôÙniôÙmaôÙlisôÙtic appliôÙcaôÙtionôÙs ôÙthat go straiôÙght to the poôÙint in orôÙder to get the things doôÙne. It's an email clienôÙt, wiôÙth no GUI, whiôÙch alloôÙws me to read emails beôÙtter than by means of the web paôÙge [1] wiôÙthout any disôÙtracôÙtionôÙs, foôÙcuôÙsing on what is just imôÙporôÙtanôÙt. It is alôÙso great that shoôÙws onôÙly the text (the ôÙreôÙleôÙvant part of the emaiôÙl) and it can foôÙllow the liôÙnks by launôÙching the deôÙfault broôÙwôÙseôÙr.

It is simôÙple, fast and perôÙfecôÙtly suiôÙtaôÙble for cheôÙcking my old inôÙbox wiôÙth weekôÙly lisôÙts upôÙdaôÙtes. IôÙt's inheôÙrited from an old proôÙjecôÙt, caôÙlled piôÙne, and in FeôÙdoôÙra it can be insôÙtaôÙlled by:

sudo dnf install alpine

Then you just need to conôÙfiôÙguôÙre the email acôÙcount seôÙttings (oôÙne last tiôÙme to viôÙsit the paôÙge, ôÙbut that would be the last :-) and you'ôÙre readôÙy.

[1]Not for gmail but from another older account I have
